title: Multiple Risk Factors — Anemia, Obesity, Elevated BP, Proteinuria

skill_advantages: Formal WHO severity classification of anemia (moderate, Hb 7-9.9 range)
Specific therapeutic iron dose (120mg elemental daily) per WHO protocol
Structured pre-eclampsia risk classification (HIGH/MODERATE with enumerated criteria)
Aspirin 75mg prophylaxis recommended with start/stop guidance
Calcium 1.5-2g daily in divided doses with spacing from iron
without_skill_gaps: No anemia severity classification -- just 'anemia' without grading
No specific iron dose -- just 'increase dose'
Aspirin completely omitted despite multiple risk factors
